lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Hello there; I see you're qualified. Come to help us out?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Hello! You're that student who recently finished all three Earth Sciences exams, aren't you? Come to help us out?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Greetings, my dear [sir/madam]. Have you come to give us a hand?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, how can I help out?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Well, you'll need to get your equipment first - it's all there on the tool rack. Use what you learned from your Earth Sciences exams. You'll need to be wearing your leather gloves and boots as well as have access to

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: your trowel, rock pick and specimen brush.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: I see you have your equipment - well done.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: To really give us a hand, you could clean some finds for us. They're mostly done - just some fine work to finish off. Take a find from the pile that the workmen are bringing in, then there are spare tables over there

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: to clean them on. If you find anything interesting, let us know and we'll see if it's good enough to go on display.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found something interesting.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Oh? Let's take a look...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this pretty necklace.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Interesting...yes...yes...hmmm.... It looks like it's enchanted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: With what?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Oh, I think it's just a benign teleportation spell. I tinker in magic when I'm not doing archaeology. I can teach you how to make more necklaces like this. Amazing that they had this kind of knowledge back then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That would be good. Where is the teleport to?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Hmm...all the indications are that it's somewhere to the east of us, but I'm not sure how far. Perhaps it was a teleport back to Saranthium. Let me just take a closer look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I just make a ruby necklace and use five fire runes and one cosmic rune to enchant it.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Yes, indeed. Well done, youngster, thanks for helping us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've cleaned this old coin - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Oh my! What a wonderful find! If this is what I believe it to be, it would allow us to date the Dig Site city.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: And look here, it has the name of the city too! Saranthium! That must be during the Saradominist occupation. This is a wonderful find. Please take it and place it in display case 45.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, display case 45 it is...

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Back again? Have you put the old coin in display case 45 yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll go do that now

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've cleaned this old coin - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: You've already shown me one of those, but it was in better condition. It's in the display case over there. You can pop this one in the finds crate over in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this really old coin - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: What have we here?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Oh! This is very interesting...and confusing at the same time. This coin means that the city that we're excavating on the Digsite - Saranthium - was actually inhabited much, much earlier by followers of Zamorak,

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: at which time, the city was known as Senntisten.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: This is a most remarkable discovery, as we have other evidence indicating that Zarosian followers were resident before the Saradominists took over, but it also seems that Zamorakian forces used it during a battle of some

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: sort. Still, it allows us to roughly date when the city changed from following Zaros and Zamorak to following Saradomin. Put it in display case 44.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Case 44 it is!

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Back again? Have you put the ancient coin in display case 44 yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll go do that now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this really old coin - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: You've already shown me one of those, but it was in better condition. It's in the display case over there. You can pop this one in the finds crate over in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this crumbly old decoration - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Ahh... That looks like an altar piece. Hmm, yes...from the early Saradominist worshippers by the looks of it. Quite delicate, too. Put it in display case 37.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Case 37 it is!

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Back again? Have you put the ancient symbol in display case 37 yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll go do that now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this crumbly old decoration - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: You've already shown me one of those, but it was in better condition. It's in the display case over there. You can pop this one in the finds crate over in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this really old decoration - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: That's in rather good condition, isn't it? An old altar decoration by the looks of things, from the Saradominist city no doubt. Put it in display case 36.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Case 36 it is!

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Back again? Have you put the old symbol in display case 36 yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll go do that now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this really old decoration - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: You've already shown me one of those, but it was in better condition. It's in the display case over there. You can pop this one in the finds crate over in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this piece of pottery - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Ahh... Oh! Hmm...yes...made by Zaros worshippers, by the looks of it. Beautifully-shaped. It looks as if this would go nicely in display case 22. This piece reinforces our evidence that the city was occupied by

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Zarosians before Saradominists.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Case 22 it is!

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Back again? Have you put the pottery in display case 22 yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll go do that now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this piece of pottery - is it of any use?

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: You've already shown me one of those, but it was in better condition. It's in the display case over there. You can pop this one in the finds crate over in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found these old arrowheads.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Ahh, yes, we find lots of those - they're not important. We already have some in our display. Just add it to the crate of finds over near the door.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: If there is anything already in the crate, feel free to take it as a reward for your work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found these old necklaces.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: An interesting find... Here, let me offer you something in return.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I cleaned up this old vase.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Ah, the vases... I've lost count of how many we've found of those... The only completely intact one is in the display case already. Just add it to the crate of finds over near the door.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: If there is anything already in the crate, feel free to take it as a reward for your work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... I seem to have lost it. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Sounds like you never had it, [lad/lass]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, just here to watch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this...

lines.speaker: Sinco Doar
lines.text: Thank you, but I don't need that
